title: Alatiglossum macropetalum
taxonomy: Alatiglossum macropetalum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the mint family, consists of more than 7,000 species of plants. Alatiglossum macropetalum is native to Australia and is a member of the genus Alatiglossum. The classification of Alatiglossum macropetalum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Alatiglossum macropetalum is a relatively rare and understudied species within the Lamiaceae family.
parts: I couldn't find sufficient information on Alatiglossum macropetalum's medicinal parts.
intro: Unfortunately, I was unable to verify any information about the plant Alatiglossum macropetalum.
